name: Puffco Peak Journey Bag
summary: The perfect Peak and Peak Pro gear for the outdoor adventurer.
description: The perfect Peak and Peak Pro gear for the outdoor adventurer. Make you visits in the nature something to remember, this bag is all you need when travelling with your Puffco Peak or Peak Pro. This discreet and solid bag makes it easy to stay organised and ready to be used whenever you want. 1 x Puffco Peak Pro Journey Bag with magnetic buckle and adjustable strap Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
